mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_student (username, password, real_name, gender, class_name, phone, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_student SET status = #{status} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE t_student SET password = #{password} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.student_id, s.real_name, s.class_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.record_id) AS practice_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN pr.is_correct IS NOT NULL THEN pr.is_correct ELSE NULL END) * 100, 1) AS practice_correct_rate, COUNT(DISTINCT er.exam_record_id) AS exam_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN er.status = 1 THEN er.total_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS exam_avg_score FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN t_practice_record pr ON s.student_id = pr.student_id LEFT JOIN t_exam_record er ON s.student_id = er.student_id
AND (s.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.real_name, s.class_name ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT s.student_id, s.real_name, s.class_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.record_id) AS practice_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN pr.is_correct IS NOT NULL THEN pr.is_correct ELSE NULL END) * 100, 1) AS practice_correct_rate, COUNT(DISTINCT er.exam_record_id) AS exam_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN er.status = 1 THEN er.total_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS exam_avg_score FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN t_practice_record pr ON s.student_id = pr.student_id LEFT JOIN t_exam_record er ON s.student_id = er.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY s.student_id, s.real_name, s.class_name

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) FROM t_student s INNER JOIN t_student_course sc ON s.student_id = sc.student_id
sc.course_id IN
#{cid}
AND (s.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
